verse.verse_4: Wa innahū fī ummil-kitābi ladainā la‘aliyyun ḥakīm(un).
verse.verse_5: Afa naḍribu ‘ankumuż-żikra ṣafḥan an kuntum qaumam musrifīn(a).
verse.verse_6: Wa kam arsalnā min nabiyyin fil-awwalīn(a).
verse.verse_7: Wa mā ya'tīhim min nabiyyin illā kānū bihī yastahzi'ūn(a).
verse.verse_8: Fa ahlaknā asyadda minhum baṭsyaw wa maḍā maṡalul-awwalīn(a).
verse.verse_9: Wa la'in sa'altahum man khalaqas-samāwāti wal-arḍa layaqūlunna khalaqahunnal-‘azīzul-‘alīm(u).
verse.verse_10: Allażī ja‘ala lakumul-arḍa mahdaw wa ja‘ala lakum fīhā subulal la‘allakum tahtadūn(a).
verse.verse_11: Wal-lażī nazzala minas-samā'i mā'am biqadar(in), fa'ansyarnā bihī baldatam maitā(n), każālika tukhrajūn(a).
verse.verse_12: Wal-lażī khalaqal-azwāja kullahā wa ja‘ala lakum minal-fulki wal-an‘āmi mā tarkabūn(a).
verse.verse_13: Litastawū ‘alā ẓuhūrihī ṡumma tażkurū ni‘mata rabbikum iżastawaitum ‘alaihi wa taqūlū subḥānal-lażī sakhkhara lanā hāżā wa mā kunnā lahū muqrinīn(a).
verse.verse_15: Wa ja‘alū lahū min ‘ibādihī juz'ā(n), innal-insāna lakafūrum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_16: Amittakhażū mimmā yakhluqu banātiw wa aṣfākum bil-banīn(a).
verse.verse_17: Wa iżā busysyira aḥaduhum bimā ḍaraba lir-raḥmāni maṡalan ẓalla wajhuhū muswaddaw wa huwa kaẓīm(un).
verse.verse_18: Awamay yunasysya'u fil-ḥilyati wa huwa fil-khiṣāmi gairu mubīn(in).
verse.verse_19: Wa ja‘alul-malā'ikatal-lażīna hum ‘ibādur raḥmāni ināṡā(n), asyahidū khalqahum, satuktabu syahādatuhum wa yus'alūn(a).
verse.verse_20: Wa qālū lau syā'ar-raḥmānu mā ‘abadnāhum, mā lahum biżālika min ‘ilm(in), in hum illā yakhruṣūn(a).
verse.verse_21: Am ātaināhum kitābam min qablihī fahum bihī mustamsikūn(a).
verse.verse_22: Bal qālū innā wajadnā ābā'anā ‘alā ummatiw wa innā ‘alā āṡārihim muhtadūn(a).
verse.verse_23: Wa każālika mā arsalnā min qablika fī qaryatim min nażīr(in), illā qāla mutrafūhā, innā wajadnā ābā'anā ‘alā ummatiw wa innā ‘alā āṡārihim muqtadūn(a).
verse.verse_24: Qāla awalau ji'tukum bi'ahdā mimmā wajattum ‘alaihi ābā'akum, qālū innā bimā ursiltum bihī kāfirūn(a).
verse.verse_26: Wa iż qāla ibrāhīmu li'abīhi wa qaumihī innanī barā'um mimmā ta‘budūn(a).
verse.verse_28: Wa ja‘alahā kalimatam bāqiyatan fī ‘aqibihī la‘allahum yarji‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_29: Bal matta‘tu hā'ulā'i wa ābā'ahum ḥattā jā'ahumul-ḥaqqu wa rasūlum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_30: Wa lammā jā'ahumul-ḥaqqu qālū hāżā siḥruw wa innā bihī kāfirūn(a).
verse.verse_31: Wa qālū lau lā nuzzila hāżal-qur'ānu ‘alā rajulim minal-qaryataini ‘aẓīm(in).
verse.verse_32: Ahum yaqsimūna raḥmata rabbik(a), naḥnu qasamnā bainahum ma‘īsyatahum fil-ḥayātid-dun-yā, wa rafa‘nā ba‘ḍahum fauqa ba‘ḍin darajātil liyattakhiża ba‘ḍuhum ba‘ḍan sukhriyyā(n), wa raḥmatu rabbika khairum mimmā yajma‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_33: Wa lau lā ay yakūnan-nāsu ummataw wāḥidatal laja‘alnā limay yakfuru bir-raḥmāni libuyūtihim suqufam min fiḍḍatiw wa ma‘ārija ‘alaihā yaẓharūn(a).
verse.verse_34: Wa libuyūtihim abwābaw wa sururan ‘alaihā yattaki'ūn(a).
verse.verse_35: Wa zukhrufā(n), wa in kullu żālika lammā matā‘ul-ḥayātid-dun-yā, wal-ākhiratu ‘inda rabbika lil-muttaqīn(a).
verse.verse_36: Wa may ya‘syu ‘an żikrir-raḥmāni nuqayyiḍ lahū syaiṭānan fahuwa lahū qarīn(un).
verse.verse_37: Wa innahum layaṣuddūnahum ‘anis-sabīli wa yaḥsabūna annahum muhtadūn(a).
verse.verse_38: Ḥattā iżā jā'anā qāla yā laita bainī wa bainaka bu‘dal-masyriqaini fa bi'sal-qarīn(u).
verse.verse_39: Wa lay yanfa‘akumul-yauma iẓ ẓalamtum annakum fil-‘ażābi musytarikūn(a).
verse.verse_40: Afa anta tusmi‘uṣ-ṣumma au tahdil-‘umya  wa man kāna fī ḍalālim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_41: Fa immā nażhabanna bika fa innā minhum muntaqimūn(a).
verse.verse_43: Fastamsik bil-lażī ūḥiya ilaik(a), innaka ‘alā ṣirāṭim mustaqīm(in).
verse.verse_44: Wa innahū lażikrul laka wa liqaumik(a), wa saufa tus'alūn(a).
verse.verse_45: Was'al man arsalnā min qablika mir rusulinā, aja‘alnā min dūnir-raḥmāni ālihatay yu‘badūn(a).
verse.verse_46: Wa laqad arsalnā mūsā bi'āyātinā ilā fir‘auna wa mala'ihī fa qāla innī rasūlu rabbil-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_47: Falammā jā'ahum bi'āyātinā iżā hum minhā yaḍḥakūn(a).
verse.verse_48: Wa mā nurīhim min āyatin illā hiya akbaru min ukhtihā, wa akhażnāhum bil-‘ażābi la‘allahum yarji‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_49: Wa qālū yā ayyuhas-sāḥirud‘u lanā rabbaka bimā ‘ahida ‘indak(a), innanā lamuhtadūn(a).
verse.verse_51: Wa nādā fir‘aunu fī qaumihī qāla yā qaumi alaisa lī mulku miṣra wa hāżihil-anhāru tajrī min taḥtī, afalā tubṣirūn(a).
verse.verse_52: Am ana khairum min hāżal-lażī huwa mahīn(un), wa lā yakādu yubīn(u).
verse.verse_53: Falau lā ulqiya ‘alaihi aswiratum min żahabin au jā'a ma‘ahul-malā'ikatu muqtarinīn(a).
verse.verse_54: Fastakhaffa qaumahū fa aṭā‘ūh(u), innahum kānū qauman fāsiqīn(a).
verse.verse_55: Falammā āsafūnantaqamnā minhum fa agraqnāhum ajma‘īn(a).
verse.verse_56: Fa ja‘alnāhum salafaw wa maṡalal lil-ākhirīn(a).
verse.verse_57: Wa lammā ḍuribabnu maryama maṡalan iżā qaumuka minhu yaṣiddūn(a).
verse.verse_58: Wa qālū a'ālihatunā khairun am huw(a), mā ḍarabūhu laka illā jadalā(n), bal hum qaumun khaṣimūn(a).
verse.verse_59: In huwa illā ‘abdun an‘amnā ‘alaihi wa ja‘alnāhu maṡalal libanī isrā'īl(a).
verse.verse_60: Wa lau nasyā'u laja‘alnā minkum malā'ikatan fil-arḍi yakhlufūn(a).
verse.verse_61: Wa innahū la‘ilmul lis-sā‘ati falā tamtarunna bihā wattabi‘ūn(i), hāżā ṣirāṭum mustaqīm(un).
verse.verse_62: Wa lā yaṣuddannakumusy-syaiṭān(u), innahū lakum ‘aduwwum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_63: Wa lammā jā'a ‘īsā bil-bayyināti qāla qad ji'tukum bil-ḥikmati wa li'ubayyina lakum ba‘ḍal-lażī takhtalifūna fīh(i), fattaqullāha wa aṭī‘ūn(i).
verse.verse_64: Innallāha huwa rabbī wa rabbukum fa‘budūh(u), hāżā ṣirāṭum mustaqīm(un).
verse.verse_65: Fakhtalafal-aḥzābu mim bainihim, fawailul lil-lażīna ẓalamūmin ‘ażābi yaumin alīm(in).
verse.verse_66: Hal yanẓurūna illas-sā‘ata an ta'tiyahum bagtataw wa hum lā yasy‘urūn(a).
verse.verse_68: Yā ‘ibādi lā khaufun ‘alaikumul-yauma wa lā antum taḥzanūn(a).
verse.verse_69: Allażīna āmanū bi'āyātinā wa kānū muslimīn(a).
verse.verse_71: Yuṭāfu ‘alaihim biṣiḥāfim min żahabiw wa akwāb(in), wa fīhā mā tasytahīhil-anfusu wa talażżul-a‘yun(u), wa antum fīhā khālidūn(a).
verse.verse_72: Wa tilkal-jannatul-latī ūriṡtumūhā bimā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_73: Lakum fīhā fākihatun kaṡīratum minhā ta'kulūn(a).
verse.verse_75: Lā yufattaru ‘anhum wa hum fīhi mublisūn(a).
verse.verse_76: Wa mā ẓalamnāhum wa lākin kānū humuẓ-ẓālimīn(a).
verse.verse_77: Wa nādau yā māliku liyaqḍi ‘alainā rabbuk(a), qāla innakum mākiṡūn(a).
verse.verse_78: Laqad ji'nākum bil-ḥaqqi wa lākinna akṡarakum lil-ḥaqqi kārihūn(a).
verse.verse_79: Am abramū amran fa innā mubrimūn(a).
verse.verse_80: Am yaḥsabūna annā lā nasma‘u sirrahum wa najwāhum, balā wa rusulunā ladaihim yaktubūn(a).
verse.verse_81: Qul in kāna lir-raḥmāni walad(un), fa ana awwalul-‘ābidīn(a).
verse.verse_83: Fa żarhum yakhūḍū wa yal‘abū ḥattā yulāqū yaumahumul-lażī yū‘adūn(a).
verse.verse_84: Wa huwal-lażī fis-samā'i ilāhuw wa fil-arḍi ilāh(un), wa huwal-ḥakīmul-‘alīm(u).
verse.verse_85: Wa tabārakal-lażī lahū mulkus-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa mā bainahumā, wa ‘indahū ‘ilmus-sā‘ah(ti), wa ilaihi turja‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_86: Wa lā yamlikul-lażīna yad‘ūna min dūnihisy-syafā‘ata illā man syahida bil-ḥaqqi wa hum ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_87: Wa la'in sa'altahum man khalaqahum layaqūlunnallāhu fa annā yu'fakūn(a).
verse.verse_88: Wa qīlihī yā rabbi inna hā'ulā'i qaumul lā yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_89: Faṣfaḥ ‘anhum wa qul salām(un), fa saufa ya‘lamūn(a).
